testcase.name: The agent responds with an error when an invalid SSID is provided during bluetooth provisioning

failure.message: Step the viam-agent bluetooth device is discoverable again: BLE device was not discoverable

error.message: Step viam-agent surfaces an invalid SSID error via bluetooth
Step viam-agent cannot reach the app

testcase.name: The agent responds with an error when invalid network credentials are provided during bluetooth provisioning
